name: Information Loss or Omission
description: The product does not record, or improperly records, security-relevant information that leads to an incorrect decision or hampers later forensic analysis. This enables attackers to hide their activities and evade detection.
detection_pattern: Look for CONTROL nodes (security decisions, error handlers, authentication events) that do not flow to a STORAGE node (audit log, event recorder). The absence of a logging path from security-relevant events means attacks cannot be detected or traced after the fact.
